hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const f=i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.file_path||'';if(f.includes('snake_game/src/')&&f.endsWith('.js')){process.exit(0);}process.exit(1);}catch(e){process.exit(1);}});" && cd e:/claude_code && npm test --silent 2>&1 | tail -5 || true
echo '{"systemMessage": "Snake Game — npm run dev (port 8000) | npm test (28 tests) | Skills: /dev /validate /game-status /test-watch /add-feature"}'
